title: Modrinth Logo Mod
description: A simple mod that adds the Modrinth logo as an item in Minecraft!
body: # Modrinth Logo Mod # This mod makes the logo from the website you're on right now Modrinth into an item in Minecraft! ![Modrinth Logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/OW6NgXk1/images/8d8623a0edf9feb401903ce93800ef620491cf30.png) You can craft it like this: ![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OW6NgXk1/images/0afc5d773696a7be407670180751a24289746d40.png) The item can also be enchanted using an anvil as seen here: ![enchanted logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/OW6NgXk1/images/7e2287986583e32b4de6cb86da8476a50e68eb56.png) If you find any issues with the mod, make an issue here You are allowed to use this mod inside your modpacks. #
